# BagIQ

> BagIQ is a disc golf bag decision engine. It spots gaps, overlap, and recommends the right disc based on how you actually throw.

## What it does

BagIQ analyses a disc golf bag and returns:
- Gap analysis: shot types the bag cannot reliably execute, with a specific disc recommendation for each gap
- Overlap detection: discs covering the same effective slot, with a recommendation on which to cut
- Disc Detox: a swipe-through tool to keep or cut each disc
- Minimal bag: the smallest possible bag that covers every shot type in use

## How it works

BagIQ asks how you throw each disc (backhand/forehand, shot shape, use case), then maps the bag against 16 functional shot slots. The analysis is based on actual throw behaviour, not flight numbers or manufacturer specs.

## Key facts

- Free to use, no account required
- Bag data is stored locally in the browser and automatically synced to a private server under a random 6-character code — no account, no email, no personally identifiable information required
- Powered by DiscList data (thedisclist.com)
- Built by Golf With Discs (golfwithdiscs.com)
- Available for white-label licensing by disc golf retailers and brands

## URLs

- Landing page: https://bagiq.app/
- App: https://app.bagiq.app/
- Privacy policy: https://bagiq.app/privacy
- Contact: hello@bagiq.app
